verses.geez:
ወተንሥአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ጽባሐ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ላባ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ባቱኤል ፡ ሶርያዊ ፡ እኁሃ ፡ ለርብቃ ፡ እሞሙ ፡
                  ለያዕቆብ ፡ ወለዔሳው ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob started and went to the land of the east to Laban, the son of Bathuel the Syrian, and the brother of Rebecca, mother of Jacob and Esau.
translations.kjv: Then Jacob went on his journey, and came into the land of the people of the east.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ይኔጽር ፡ ወይሬኢ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወሀሎ ፡ ህየ ፡ ሠላስ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ወያዐርፋ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ እምነ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ ያሰትይዎን ፡ ለውእቶን ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አፉሃ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ እብን ፡
                  ዐቢይ ።

translations.lxx: And he looks, and behold! a well in the plain; and there were there three flocks of sheep resting at it, for out of that well they watered the flocks, but there was a great stone at the mouth of the well.
translations.kjv: And he looked, and behold a well in the field, and, lo, there were three flocks of sheep lying by it; for out of that well they watered the flocks: and a great stone was upon the well’s mouth.

verses.geez:
ወይትጋብኡ ፡ ህየ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ኖሎት ፡ ወያሴስልዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ እብን ፡ እምአፈ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ያሰትዩ ፡
                  አባግዒሆሙ ፡ ወያገብእዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ እብን ፡ ውስተ ፡ አፈ ፡ ዐዘቅት ።

translations.lxx: And there were all the flocks gathered, and they used to roll away the stone from the mouth of the well, and water the flocks, and set the stone again in its place on the mouth of the well.
translations.kjv: And thither were all the flocks gathered: and they rolled the stone from the well’s mouth, and watered the sheep, and put the stone again upon the well’s mouth in his place.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ አኅዊነ ፡ እምነ ፡ አይቴ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ እምነ ፡ ካራን ፡ ንሕነ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said to them, Brethren, whence are ye? and they said, We are of Charrhan.
translations.kjv: And Jacob said unto them, My brethren, whence be ye? And they said, Of Haran are we.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ታአምርዎኑ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ናኮር ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ናአምሮ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them, Know ye Laban, the son of Nachor? and they said, We do know him.
translations.kjv: And he said unto them, Know ye Laban the son of Nahor? And they said, We know him.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዳኅንኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ዳኅን ፡ ወእንዘ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይትናገሩ ፡ ናሁ ፡ መጽአት ፡ ራሔል ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  አባግዐ ፡ አቡሃ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them, Is he well? And they said, He is well. And behold Rachel his daughter came with the sheep.
translations.kjv: And he said unto them, Is he well? And they said, He is well: and, behold, Rachel his daughter cometh with the sheep.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዓዲኑ ፡ ኢበጽሐ ፡ ሰዐት ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትጋባእ ፡ እንስሳክሙ ፡ ወታሰትዩ ፡ ወይሑር ፡ ይትረዐይ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said, It is yet high day, it is not yet time that the flocks be gathered together; water ye the flocks, and depart and feed them.
translations.kjv: And he said, Lo, it is yet high day, neither is it time that the cattle should be gathered together: water ye the sheep, and go and feed them.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ኢንክል ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢይትጋብኡ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ኖሎት ፡ ወያሰስልዋ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ እብን ፡ እምአፈ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡
                  ወናሰቲ ፡ አባግዒነ ።

translations.lxx: And they said, We shall not be able, until all the shepherds be gathered together, and they shall roll away the stone from the mouth of the well, then we will water the flocks.
translations.kjv: And they said, We cannot, until all the flocks be gathered together, and till they roll the stone from the well’s mouth; then we water the sheep.

verses.geez: ወእንዘ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ይትናገሩ ፡ በጽሐት ፡ ራሔል ፡ ምስለ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ አቡሃ ።

translations.lxx: While he was yet speaking to them, behold, Rachel the daughter of Laban came with her father's sheep, for she fed the sheep of her father.
translations.kjv: And while he yet spake with them, Rachel came with her father’s sheep: for she kept them.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእያ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ወለተ ፡ ላባ ፡ እኁሃ ፡ ለእሙ ፡ [አሰሰለ ፡ እብነ ፡ እምዐዘቅት ፡ ወአስተየ ፡
                  ላቲ ፡ አባግዒሃ ።]

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when Jacob saw Rachel the daughter of Laban, his mother's brother, and the sheep of Laban, his mother's brother, that Jacob came and rolled away the stone from the mouth of the well, and watered the sheep of Laban, his mother's brother.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when Jacob saw Rachel the daughter of Laban his mother’s brother, and the sheep of Laban his mother’s brother, that Jacob went near, and rolled the stone from the well’s mouth, and watered the flock of Laban his mother’s brother.

verses.geez: ወሰዐማ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ወጸርኀ ፡ በቃሉ ፡ ወበከየ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob kissed Rachel, and cried with a loud voice and wept.
translations.kjv: And Jacob kissed Rachel, and lifted up his voice, and wept.

verses.geez:
ወአይድዓ ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ከመ ፡ ወልደ ፡ እኅቱ ፡ ለአቡሃ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወሮጸት ፡ ራሔል
                  ፡ ወአይድዐቶ ፡ ለአቡሃ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ።

translations.lxx: And he told Rachel that he was the near relative of her father, and the son of Rebecca; and she ran and reported to her father according to these words.
translations.kjv: And Jacob told Rachel that he was her father’s brother, and that he was Rebekah’s son: and she ran and told her father.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ሰምዐ ፡ ላባ ፡ ስመ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ እኅቱ ፡ ሮጸ ፡ ወተቀበሎ ፡ ወሐቀፎ ፡ ወሰዐሞ ፡ ወወሰዶ
                  ፡ ቤቶ ፡ ወነገሮ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when Laban heard the name of Jacob, his sister's son, he ran to meet him, and embraced and kissed him, and brought him into his house; and he told Laban all these sayings.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when Laban heard the tidings of Jacob his sister’s son, that he ran to meet him, and embraced him, and kissed him, and brought him to his house. And he told Laban all these things.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዐጽምየ ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ሥጋየ ፡ አንተ ፡ ወነበረ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ሠላሳ ፡ መዋዕለ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban said to him, Thou art of my bones and of my flesh; and he was with him a full month.
translations.kjv: And Laban said to him, Surely thou art my bone and my flesh. And he abode with him the space of a month.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ እስመ ፡ እኁየ ፡ አንተ ፡ ኢትትቀነይ ፡ ሊተ ፡ በከ ፡ [ንግረኒ ፡] ምንት ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ዐስብከ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban said to Jacob, Surely thou shalt not serve me for nothing, because thou art my brother; tell me what thy reward is to be.
translations.kjv: And Laban said unto Jacob, Because thou art my brother, shouldest thou therefore serve me for nought? tell me, what shall thy wages be?

verses.geez: ወቦቱ ፡ ላባ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ አዋልደ ፡ ወስማ ፡ ለአሐቲ ፡ ለእንተ ፡ ትልህቅ ፡ ልያ ፡ ወለእንተ ፡ ትንእስ ፡ ራሔል ።

translations.lxx: Now Laban had two daughters, the name of the elder was Lea, and the name of the younger, Rachel.
translations.kjv: And Laban had two daughters: the name of the elder was Leah, and the name of the younger was Rachel.

verses.geez: ወልያሰ ፡ ትደዊ ፡ አዕይንቲሃ ፡ ወራሔልሰ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ራእያ ፡ ወለሓይ ፡ ገጻ ።

translations.lxx: And the eyes of Lea were weak. But Rachel was beautiful in appearance, and exceedingly fair in countenance.
translations.kjv: Leah was tender eyed; but Rachel was beautiful and well favoured.

verses.geez:
ወአፍቀራ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለላባ ፡ እትቀነይ ፡ ለከ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ዓመተ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ራሔል
                  ፡ ወለትከ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትንእስ ፡ (ወሀበኒያ ፡ ኪያሃ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትኩነኒ ፡ ብእሲተ ።)

translations.lxx: And Jacob loved Rachel, and said, I will serve thee seven years for thy younger daughter Rachel.
translations.kjv: And Jacob loved Rachel; and said, I will serve thee seven years for Rachel thy younger daughter.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ይኄይሰኒ ፡ ለከ ፡ አሀብ ፡ (ለማእምርየ ፡ ወለሥጋየ ፡) እምነ ፡ ለካልእ ፡ ብእሲ ፤ ንበር ፡ እንከሰ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Laban said to him, It is better that I should give her to thee, than that I should give her to another man; dwell with me.
translations.kjv: And Laban said, It is better that I give her to thee, than that I should give her to another man: abide with me.

verses.geez:
ወተቀንየ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ዓመተ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ወኮና ፡ በቅድሜሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘኅዳጥ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ያፈቅራ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob served for Rachel seven years, and they were before him as a few days, by reason of his loving her.
translations.kjv: And Jacob served seven years for Rachel; and they seemed unto him but a few days, for the love he had to her.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ሀበኒያ ፡ እንከሰ ፡ ብእሲትየ ፡ ከመ ፡ እባእ ፡ ኀቤሃ ፡ እስመ ፡ ፈጸምኩ ፡ መዋዕሊሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said to Laban, Give me my wife, for my days are fulfilled, that I may go in to her.
translations.kjv: And Jacob said unto Laban, Give me my wife, for my days are fulfilled, that I may go in unto her.

verses.geez: ወአስተጋብኦሙ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለኵሎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ወገብረ ፡ ከብካበ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban gathered together all the men of the place, and made a marriage-feast.
translations.kjv: And Laban gathered together all the men of the place, and made a feast.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ መስየ ፡ ነሥኣ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለልያ ፡ ወለቱ ፡ ወአብኣ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: And it was even, and he took his daughter Lea, and brought her in to Jacob, and Jacob went in to her.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass in the evening, that he took Leah his daughter, and brought her to him; and he went in unto her.

verses.geez: ወወሀባ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለወለቱ ፡ ልያ ፡ ዘለፋሃ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ትኩና ፡ አመተ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban gave to his daughter Lea, Zelpha his handmaid, as a handmaid for her.
translations.kjv: And Laban gave unto his daughter Leah Zilpah his maid for an handmaid.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ጸብሐ ፡ ነያ ፡ ልያ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ረሴይከኒ ፡ አኮኑ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ራሔል ፡
                  ተቀነይኩ ፡ ለከ ፡ ምንተ ፡ አስታሕቀርከኒ ።

translations.lxx: And it was morning, and behold it was Lea; and Jacob said to Laban, What is this that thou hast done to me? did I not serve thee for Rachel? and wherefore hast thou deceived me?
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, that in the morning, behold, it was Leah: and he said to Laban, What is this thou hast done unto me? did not I serve with thee for Rachel? wherefore then hast thou beguiled me?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ በብሔርነሰ ፡ ኢይቀድሙ ፡ ውሂበ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትንእስ ፡ እንዘ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትልህቅ ፡
                  ሀለወት ።

translations.lxx: And Laban answered, It is not done thus in our country, to give the younger before the elder.
translations.kjv: And Laban said, It must not be so done in our country, to give the younger before the firstborn.

verses.geez:
ፈጽም ፡ ለዛቲኒ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ዓመተ ፡ ወእሁበከ ፡ ኪያሃኒ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ዘተቀነይከ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ካልአ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ዓመተ
                  ።

translations.lxx: Fulfil then her sevens, and I will give to thee her also in return for thy labour, which thou labourest with me, yet seven other years.
translations.kjv: Fulfil her week, and we will give thee this also for the service which thou shalt serve with me yet seven other years.

verses.geez: ወገብረ ፡ ላቲኒ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወፈጸመ ፡ ላቲኒ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ዓመቲሃ ፡ ወወሀቦ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ራሔልሃ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob did so, and fulfilled her sevens; and Laban gave him his daughter Rachel to wife.
translations.kjv: And Jacob did so, and fulfilled her week: and he gave him Rachel his daughter to wife also.

verses.geez: ወወሀባ ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ባላሃ ፡ ትኩና ፡ አመታ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban gave to his daughter his handmaid Balla, for a handmaid to her.
translations.kjv: And Laban gave to Rachel his daughter Bilhah his handmaid to be her maid.

verses.geez:
ወቦአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ወአፍቀራ ፡ ፈድፋደ ፡ እምነ ፡ ልያ ፡ ወተቀንየ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ካልእተ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡
                  ዓመተ ፡ በእንቲአሃ ።

translations.lxx: And he went in to Rachel; and he loved Rachel more than Lea; and he served him seven other years.
translations.kjv: And he went in also unto Rachel, and he loved also Rachel more than Leah, and served with him yet seven other years.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ትጸላእ ፡ ልያ ፡ ፈትሐ ፡ ማሕፀና ፡ ወራሔልሰ ፡ ኮነት ፡ መካነ ።

translations.lxx: And when the Lord God saw that Lea was hated, he opened her womb; but Rachel was barren.
translations.kjv: And when the LORD saw that Leah was hated, he opened her womb: but Rachel was barren.

verses.geez:
ወፀንሰት ፡ ልያ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ሩቤል ፡ እንዘ ፡ ትብል ፡ እስመ ፡ ርእየኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ ትሕትናየ ፡ ወእምይእዜሰ ፡ ያፈቅረኒ ፡ ምትየ ።

translations.lxx: And Lea conceived and bore a son to Jacob; and she called his name, Ruben; saying, Because the Lord has looked on my humiliation, and has given me a son, now then my husband will love me.
translations.kjv: And Leah conceived, and bare a son, and she called his name Reuben: for she said, Surely the LORD hath looked upon my affliction; now therefore my husband will love me.

verses.geez:
ወደገመት ፡ ፀንሰት ፡ ልያ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ካልአ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ እስመ ፡ ሰምዐኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ እጸላእ ፡ ወሰከኒ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ስምዖን ።

translations.lxx: And she conceived again, and bore a second son to Jacob; and she said, Because the Lord has heard that I am hated, he has given to me this one also; and she called his name, Simeon.
translations.kjv: And she conceived again, and bare a son; and said, Because the LORD hath heard that I was hated, he hath therefore given me this son also: and she called his name Simeon.

verses.geez:
ወፀንሰት ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ እምይእዜሰኬ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ምትየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ወለድኩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡
                  ሠለስተ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ወሰመየት ፡ ስሞ ፡ ሌዊ ።

translations.lxx: And she conceived yet again, and bore a son, and said, In the present time my husband will be with me, for I have born him three sons; therefore she called his name, Levi.
translations.kjv: And she conceived again, and bare a son; and said, Now this time will my husband be joined unto me, because I have born him three sons: therefore was his name called Levi.

verses.geez:
ወፀንሰት ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ በእንተዝ ፡ አአምኖ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክ ፡
                  ወበእንተዝ ፡ ሰመየት ፡ ስሞ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ [ወአቀመት ፡ ወሊደ ።]

translations.lxx: And having conceived yet again, she bore a son, and said, Now yet again this time will I give thanks to the Lord; therefore she called his name, Juda; and ceased bearing.
translations.kjv: And she conceived again, and bare a son: and she said, Now will I praise the LORD: therefore she called his name Judah; and left bearing.
